mapper.select:
select
from t_wxdept_users u
where (u.f_user_id = #{login} or u.f_user_name = #{login}) and (u.f_enable is null or u.f_enable != '0') limit 1

select
from t_wxdept_users u
where (u.f_enable is null or u.f_enable != '0')
and u.f_dept_id = #{departmentId}
and a.authority_value = #{authority}
and a.authority_value is null
and (u.f_user_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.f_user_id like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by d.f_order_index, u.f_user_name
select f_dept_id as id, f_dept_id as dept_id, f_dept_nm as name, f_parent_dept_id as parent_id, f_order_index as sort_no from t_wxdept order by f_order_index, f_dept_id

select
from t_meeting_authority ma join t_wxdept_users u on u.f_user_id = ma.user_id
where ma.dept_id = #{departmentId} and ma.authority = 3 and ma.group_code = #{groupCode} order by ma.id limit 1
